3101450.name: Paws & Potions
3101450.description:
In Paws & Potions, play as a kitten in third-person view, racing against time to help Emília the witch prepare potions before nightfall!

Deliver the correct ingredients as quickly as possible and discover the world around you.

FAMILY BUSINESS

As the cat of Emília and Laura it's your job to help them run their business, ensuring quick and clean service. Whether aided by Edgar — a wise old book — or working alone, bring the correct and properly processed ingredients to the cauldron and watch the magic happen.

At the end of the day, you can rest in your cozy little bed... Or take advantage of your free time to explore the garden!

BEYOND THE GARDEN

Unlock and discover new areas and ingredients as you complete tasks. Navigate through swamps, forests, and ruins in search of lost treasures.

Explore and uncover secrets in each of the new areas: new shortcuts, new mechanics, and maybe even... new problems?
3101450.supported_languages:
英语*, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
